buildCommand: git init && git add -A && git config user.email 'build@vercel.com' && git config user.name 'Vercel' && git commit -m 'init' && PATH=$PWD/go/bin:$PATH ./hugo --config config/bootstrap/hugo.yaml --gc --minify
installCommand: npm install && curl -L https://go.dev/dl/go1.21.0.linux-amd64.tar.gz | tar -xz && curl -L https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/releases/download/v0.147.2/hugo_extended_0.147.2_linux-amd64.tar.gz | tar -xz && PATH=$PWD/go/bin:$PATH ./hugo mod vendor
